prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（理科）最低位次约958→698→7407（2023年异常断档）→934→1180，剔除2023年异常值后，正常年份位次在698–1180之间波动，2025年基准约1 180名，较2024年（934名）后移约246名，呈小幅后移趋势；本省物理类计划2021年54人、2022年53人、2023年51人、2024年41人、2025年45人；2026年 计划42人，较2025年减少3人（缩招约6.7%），计划缩减意味着竞争略有加剧，位次数字有上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科202 6年主榜排名第16位（Top20），近年排名稳定在第14–16位区间，综合实力稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，事件统计51条（正面1 、负面46、中性4），主要涉及师德师风与学术不端舆情，对报考心理可能产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第35位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；口腔医 学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、数学A、化学A、生物学A、药学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A、马克思主义理论A、中国史A；A-及以上学科达19个，学科实力 雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、口腔医学、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与川大优势学科高度匹配；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人，较2025年（47669人）基本持平，竞争格局总体稳定；四川大学 位于成都市，与青海省地理距离较近，历来是青海考生报考的热门选择之一；该校在青海省招生规模相对稳定（物理类40–55人区间），地域偏好因素对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1180名、2026年计划缩招约6.7%（位次上移压力）、学校声誉偏负面（报考热度可能略有降温）以及专业热度持续高企（竞争不减）等多重因素，预 计2026年物理类最低位次在1133名基础上小幅上移约27名，预测最低位次约1160名，区间1060–1260名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (Science) was approximately 958 → 698 → 7407 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 934 → 1180. Excluding the abnormal 2023 value, normal year rankings fluctuated between 698 and 1180. The 2025 baseline is about 1180, shifting back by about 246 places compared to 2024 (934), showing a slight backward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 54 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 45 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 42, a decrease of 3 (about 6.7%) from 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition and upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 16th (Top 20), with stable rankings between 14th and 16th in recent years, firmly among the top national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, with 51 events (1 positive, 46 negative, 4 neutral), mainly involving teacher ethics and academic misconduct, which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. It has A+ disciplines in Stomatology, Chinese Language and Literature, and Nursing; A disciplines in Clinical Medicine, Mathematics, Chemistry, Biology, Pharmacy, Software Engineering, Light Industry Technology and Engineering, Marxist Theory, and Chinese History; with 19 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and high appeal to top-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly recommended, closely matching Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, roughly the same as 2025 (47,669), indicating a stable competitive landscape. Located in Chengdu, Sichuan University is geographically close to Qinghai and has historically been a popular choice for Qinghai examinees. Its enrollment scale in Qinghai is relatively stable (40–55 in Physics Category), and regional preference factors have a neutral impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1180, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 6.7% (upward pressure on rankings), the negative reputation (possible slight cooling of application enthusiasm), and sustained high popularity of majors (unabated competition), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly increase by about 27 places from 1133, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1160, and a range of 1060–1260.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Stomatology (5-year/5+3 integrated/8-year)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year/8-year)
- Computer Science (including dual bachelor's degrees)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Cyberspace Security (including dual bachelor's degrees)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Advanced Chemical Engineering and High-End Equipment)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Clean Energy and Smart Construction)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1060–1260, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology/Clinical Medicine/Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Engineering Pilot Classes as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1050), prioritize A+ disciplines like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine. If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 1250), mainly consider Tier 3 Engineering Pilot Classes, supplemented by Tier 2 Electrical and Electronic Information majors.

The 2025 baseline is about 400, which is about 37 places lower than 2024 (363), showing a narrow fluctuation pattern. The provincial History Category enrollment plan: 7 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 17 in 2025; 16 in 2026, a decrease of 1 (about 5.9% reduction) compared to 2025. The slight reduction in plan puts mild upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 16th (Top 20), with comprehensive strength firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, with 51 reported incidents, mainly involving teacher ethics and academic misconduct, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately high. Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, Marxist Theory A. The disciplines of literature, history, philosophy, and law are outstanding, strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 400, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 5.9% (mild upward pressure on rankings), the negative reputation (possible slight cooling of application enthusiasm), and the undiminished appeal of strong liberal arts disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift upward by about 24 places from 386, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 410, and a range of 370–460.
